events.title: Netflix reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Netflix reached its best available historical closing price of USD 133.91.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Netflix added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Netflix is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Platform companies are often judged by whether user engagement, regulation and monetisation remain supportive over time.
